title: Board templates Should carry over Automations/Integrations

posts.author: TahaQ (Taha Qazi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having to add the same automations/integrations every time you create a board is redundant.
You are creating the same exact automations and integrations and it can easily be carried over into the template format.
Bonus points or have a quick add page where you can multi add some automations/integrations to multiple boards all at once.

posts.author: Johnsa9 (Ashley Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml: YES! I have a topic about the same thing. I am constantly adding new features to my templates but having to go through 50 separate boards to add ONE automation (which are all boards that were created by the template to begin with!)
